creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Wolfram Schneider from comment #1)

You and I both did, but I think me more than you. You that the description of the MEMRANGE_GET and MEMRANGE_SET ioctls are indented wrong (they should be aligned with text for the MEM_EXTRACT_PADDR ioctl), and me that those .Ss won't be here until https://reviews.freebsd.org/D34574 lands - which incidentally will also fix the wrong indenting. (For some reason, I thought it already had when I got to it.)
